createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: A globally unique identifier of a section to be used in all external references.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of course title (e.g. short title, long title).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

value.title: Value
value.description: The title for the section associated with the type.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of course description (e.g. short description, long description).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

value.title: Value
value.description: The description for the section associated with the type.

startOn.title: Offering Start Date
startOn.description: The starting date at which a section may be scheduled to be taken.

endOn.title: Offering End Date
endOn.description: The ending date at which a section may no longer be scheduled to be taken.

code.title: Section Code
code.description: The human-readable identifier of a section. It is generally unique within an academic period.

number.title: Section Number
number.description: A numbering scheme or other mark that distinguishes between multiple sections.  It is generally unique within an academic period and course.

instructionalPlatform.title: Instructional Platform
instructionalPlatform.description: A technology platform used to manage the administration of a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Platform.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic time period associated with a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

censusDates.title: Census Dates
censusDates.description: The dates at which the section's enrollment/headcount is determined. These dates override the census dates for the academic period, if they are different.

course.title: Course
course.description: The smallest unit of instruction for which an organization grants credits.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course.

courseCategories.title: Course Categories
courseCategories.description: The categories to which the course may belong (for example - Vocational, Co-op Work Experience, Lab, Music, etc.)

items.title: Course Categories
items.description: The categories to which the course may belong (for example - Vocational, Co-op Work Experience, Lab, Music, etc.)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course Categories.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Unit specification that can be awarded for completing a section.

creditCategory.title: Credit Category
creditCategory.description: The academic credit category associated with the section.

creditType.title: Credit Type
creditType.description: The higher-level category of academic credit.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The academic credit category associated with the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

measure.title: Unit of Measure
measure.description: A unit or standard of measurement.

minimum.title: Minimum number
minimum.description: The lower, inclusive bound of a numeric range of values.

maximum.title: Maximum number
maximum.description: The upper, inclusive bound of a numeric range of values.

increment.title: Increment number
increment.description: The multiple by which a numeric range of values can be stepped from the minimum to the maximum. For example, a range of 1 to 3 with an increment of 1 would evaluate to 1, 2, or 3. Specifying an increment of 0.5 would evaluate to 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, or 3

site.title: Site
site.description: The primary location within the organization where a section's meetings will be held.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Site.

academicLevels.title: Academic Level
academicLevels.description: The levels of academic progress that can be associated with a section.

items.title: Academic Level
items.description: The levels of academic progress that can be associated with a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

gradeSchemes.title: Grade Schemes
gradeSchemes.description: The grading schemes that may be used to award a grade to a student in this section of the course. Must be a subset of the grade schemes of the course.

items.title: Grade Schemes
items.description: The grading schemes that may be used to award a grade to a student in this section of the course. Must be a subset of the grade schemes of the course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grade Schemes.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course Levels.

instructionalMethods.title: Instructional Methods
instructionalMethods.description: The method, style, or format in which the section of a course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

items.title: Instructional Methods
items.description: The method, style, or format in which the section of a course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Methods.

hours.title: Hours
hours.description: The hours that may be assigned to the section by instructional method.

administrativeInstructionalMethod.title: Administrative Instructional Method
administrativeInstructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format for which hours are established for a section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Administrative Instructional Method.

minimum.title: Minimum
minimum.description: The minimum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

maximum.title: Maximum
maximum.description: The maximum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

increment.title: Increment
increment.description: The increment specified for the hours.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: The interval specified for the hours.

instructionalDeliveryMethod.title: Instructional Delivery Method
instructionalDeliveryMethod.description: The delivery method of instruction for the section (for example: 'Face to face', 'Web', etc.)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Delivery Method.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of a section (for example, open, closed, pending, cancelled).

category.title: Category
category.description: The category of the section status.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The scheme for calculating the duration of a section

length.title: Length
length.description: The duration length, expressed in duration units.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: The calendar period of time equivalent to 1 unit of duration.

maxEnrollment.title: Maximum Enrollment
maxEnrollment.description: The maximum number of persons who are allowed to enroll for a section.

reservedSeatsMaximum.title: Reserved Seats Maximum
reservedSeatsMaximum.description: The maximum number of reserved seats for the section.

waitlistMaximum.title: Waitlist Maximum
waitlistMaximum.description: The maximum number of slots in the waitlist for the section.

registrationInterval.title: Registration Interval
registrationInterval.description: The amount of time a student has to register for the section once notified that they are allowed to do so.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: The unit (day,hour) used to specify the time the student has to register.

value.title: Value
value.description: The number of the specified units that a student has to register.

eligible.title: Eligible
eligible.description: An indicator as to whether the section is eligible for a waitlist.

crossListed.title: Cross Listed
crossListed.description: An indication if this section is cross listed.

owningInstitutionUnits.title: Owning Institution Units
owningInstitutionUnits.description: The units (departments) of the educational institution which own, or are responsible for, a course

institutionUnit.title: Institution Unit
institutionUnit.description: A unit (department) of the educational institution

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institution Unit.

ownershipPercentage.title: Percent Ownership
ownershipPercentage.description: The rate or proportion per hundred of ownership that is attributable to the organization.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: The number of units that may be used to calculate the charge for the section as part of registration processing.

chargeAssessmentMethod.title: Charge Assessment Method
chargeAssessmentMethod.description: The method used to assess the charge for the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Charge Assessment Method.

alternateIds.title: Alternate Ids
alternateIds.description: Additional unique identifiers assigned to sections to support non-Ethos integrations.

title.title: Title
title.description: The title of the alternate identifier.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the alternate identifier.

reportingAcademicPeriod.title: Reporting Academic Period
reportingAcademicPeriod.description: The reporting academic period associated with the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Reporting Academic Period.
